metadata.title: GitHub | AdonERP
metadata.description: Join our open-source community on GitHub. Contribute code, review pull requests, and shape the roadmap alongside developers from more than 180 countries.

hero.title: Together, on
hero.description: Adon ERP is open-source. Fork the repo, contribute code, review pull requests, and shape the roadmap alongside developers from more than 180 countries.

whyContributeSection.title: Your code,
whyContributeSection.subtitle: shipped worldwide
whyContributeSection.description: Every contribution goes into production. Fix a bug, ship a feature, improve docs — and watch your work land in the hands of tens of thousands of businesses.

features.title: Open-source codebase
features.description: Browse the full source code under a permissive license. Understand exactly how things work and propose improvements.

features.title: Fork & build freely
features.description: Clone, fork, and tailor the platform to your needs — whether you are building a module, an integration, or an entire vertical.

features.title: Power the community
features.description: Your patches and features ship to thousands of businesses. Every line of code you contribute has real-world impact.

features.title: Ship faster together
features.description: Collaborate with developers, designers, and product folks on issues, RFCs, and pull requests — with tooling built for async teamwork.

howItWorksSection.title: Four steps to your first pull request
howItWorksSection.description: Our open-source workflow is documented, automated, and welcoming to first-time contributors.

steps.title: Browse open issues
steps.description: Find an issue tagged good-first-issue or feature-request. Our curated issue boards make discovery fast.

steps.title: Fork & branch
steps.description: Fork the repo, create a focused branch, and start building. Our CONTRIBUTING guide covers every step.

steps.title: Open a pull request
steps.description: Share your changes with the maintainer team. Clear PR templates and automated CI checks keep reviews smooth.

steps.title: Ship & celebrate
steps.description: Once merged, your code ships to users worldwide. Earn contributor badges, changelog mentions, and community recognition.

activePRsSection.title: Active pull requests
activePRsSection.description: See what collaborators are working on right now.

cli.title: CLI: your first commit in 2 minutes
cli.description: Install the AdonERP CLI, authenticate with your GitHub account, and push your first patch — all without leaving the terminal.
commands: ✔ PR template ready — add your description and push!

contributorsSection.title: Our top contributors
contributorsSection.description: Developers who go above and beyond deserve the spotlight. These contributors have shaped the most active areas of the codebase this year.

milestonesSection.title: Earn your place
milestonesSection.subtitle: in the hall of fame
milestonesSection.description: As you contribute, you unlock increasingly prestigious contributor tiers — each with its own badge, perks, and community privileges.

testimonials.quote: Contributing to Adon ERP gave me a real sense of ownership. I shipped features that thousands of companies now use daily. The review process is genuinely friendly and thorough.
testimonials.name: Omar Yousef

testimonials.quote: The open-source docs alone convinced me this is special. I started with a typo fix, ended up owning the inventory barcode module. Best collaboration experience I have had.
testimonials.name: Lena Kowalska

ctaSection.title: Ready to ship your first PR?
ctaSection.description: Adon ERP is open-source — built by a global community of developers, product people, and designers. Your code matters here.
ctaSection.footerText: Open-source · MIT Licensed · Welcoming to first-timers
